zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Windsor I於1275年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾布拉登哈姆時，他的父親William Wyndsore V45歲，母親Margaret Dorkenford22歲。他和Julian Stapleton至少有2個兒子。他於1325年登記服兵役。他去世於1326年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Windsor I于1275年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾布拉登哈姆时，他的父亲William Wyndsore V45岁，母亲Margaret Dorkenford22岁。他和Julian Stapleton至少有2个儿子。他于1325年登记服兵役。他去世于1326年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Windsor I was born in 1275, in Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William Wyndsore V, was 45 and his mother, Margaret Dorkenford, was 22. He had at least 2 sons with Julian Stapleton. He registered for military service in 1325. He died in 1326, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Windsor I est né en 1275, à Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Wyndsore V, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret Dorkenford, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Julian Stapleton. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1325. Il est décédé en 1326, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Windsor I 1275 in Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wyndsore V 45 und seine Mutter Margaret Dorkenford 22. Er hatte mit Julian Stapleton mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1325 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1326 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Windsor I è nato il nel 1275 nel Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William Wyndsore V, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Dorkenford, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Julian Stapleton. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1325. Morì nel 1326, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Windsor Iが1275年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブラデンハムで生まれた時，父William Wyndsore Vは45歳，母Margaret Dorkenfordは22歳であった。彼はJulian Stapletonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1325年に兵役登録をした。彼は1326年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Windsor I(이)가 1275년 영국 벅잉함실르 브라데함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wyndsore V(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Dorkenford(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Julian Stapleton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1325년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1326년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Windsor I nasceu em 1275, em Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Wyndsore V, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Dorkenford, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Julian Stapleton. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1325. Ele faleceu em 1326, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Windsor I родился в 1275 г. в местности браденам, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wyndsore V было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Dorkenford, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Julian Stapleton. В 1325 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1326 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Windsor I nació en 1275, en Bradenham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Wyndsore V, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaret Dorkenford, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Julian Stapleton. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1325. Murió en 1326, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
